testCases.title: Verify that user can register with all fields including optional fields filled

steps.action: Navigate to registration page from url "https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login"
Enter valid username "newuser003", email "newuser003@example.com", password "ValidPass@789", and confirm password "ValidPass@789"
steps.expected: All required fields should be filled

steps.action: Enter optional fields including phone number "1234567890" and address "123 Main Street"
steps.expected: Optional fields should be filled successfully

steps.action: Verify successful registration message is displayed
Verify all entered data is saved correctly
steps.expected: User profile should contain all submitted information
